NOTICE OF WITHDRAWAL OF NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION FILED ON JANUARY 15, 2020. ADDITIONALLY, THIS MOTION HAS NOT BEEN FILED ON DECEMBER 30, 2020 AS ORDERED BY THE COURT ON DECEMBER 30, 2020. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Continued To May-06-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CURRY PARKWAY, L.P. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action is OFF CALEDANR. Notice of Withdrawal of Notice of Pendency of Action filed on January 15, 2020. Additionally, this motion has not been filed on December 30, 2020 as ordered by the Court on December 30, 2020. No Notice of Motion or Motion was submitted for filing on December 30, 2019. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
